text: No person riding or leading a horse shall carry any package, bundle, or article which prevents such person from keeping at least one hand upon the reins.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 34
##### § 1263 — Carrying articles

No person riding or leading a horse shall carry any package, bundle, or article which prevents such person from keeping at least one hand upon the reins.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: No person riding or leading a horse shall carry any package, bundle, or article which prevents such person from keeping at least one hand upon the reins.
